title: AFI Pipeline Template v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — parameterized pipeline topology)
description: A pipeline TEMPLATE (afi.pipeline-template.v1) is the afi.pipeline.v1 shape plus templateId + templateVersion + a declared parameters[] list, with substitution points expressed as {"$param":"<name>"} value slots anywhere a concrete value is legal. The Factory INSTANTIATES a template by resolving every slot against caller-supplied parameter values (validated against each parameter's inline JSON-schema fragment, defaults applied) and emitting a concrete afi.pipeline.v1 manifest, which MUST then pass the full pipeline contract (schema + graph constraints). Templates are authoring artifacts only: nothing executes a template.
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only. The instantiation contract is documented in this directory's README and proven by the instantiation test in tests/pipeline-schema-validation.test.ts (template example + params -> valid afi.pipeline.v1). Graph-semantic constraints are NOT re-stated here: they bind the INSTANTIATED pipeline (a template whose every instantiation violates them is unusable, which tooling surfaces at instantiation time). Structure slots are deliberately NOT parameterizable: node ids, categories, pluginIds, edge endpoints, join declarations, and identity fields are concrete — parameters tune values, never topology.
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 — authorizes the canonical V1 contract family
https://afi-protocol.org/schemas/pipeline/v1/pipeline.schema.json — the concrete contract every instantiation must satisfy

x-afiConstraints.declaredSlots: TOOLING-ENFORCED: every {"$param":"<name>"} slot in the template MUST reference a declared parameters[].name; parameter names MUST be unique. Checked by tests/pipeline-schema-validation.test.ts.
x-afiConstraints.instantiation: The Factory resolves parameters -> concrete afi.pipeline.v1: (1) validate supplied values against each parameter's schema fragment; (2) apply defaults for absent optional parameters; (3) fail closed if a required parameter (required:true, no default) is absent; (4) deep-replace every slot with its resolved value; (5) drop templateId/templateVersion/parameters and set schema to 'afi.pipeline.v1'; (6) the result MUST validate against the full pipeline contract (schema + x-afiConstraints graph semantics) or instantiation fails closed.
x-afiConstraints.topologyIsConcrete: Node ids, categories, pluginIds, edge endpoints, entry, and join declarations are concrete in the template — parameters tune VALUES (timeouts, retries, config, condition operands, plugin versions), never graph structure.
x-afiConstraints.hashMaterial: Canonical template hashing follows schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md (domain tag afi.factory.pipeline-template), excluding description and metadata.

schema.description: Schema-id version of the pipeline template.

templateVersion.description: Semantic version of the template (WITH v prefix). New version per change, never mutation.

parameters.description: Declared substitution parameters. Every {"$param":"<name>"} slot in the template must reference one of these names (x-afiConstraints.declaredSlots).

pipelineId.description: pipelineId of the instantiated pipeline (concrete — identity is never parameterized).

description.description: OPTIONAL annotation; excluded from canonical hash material.

entry.description: Entry node id of the instantiated pipeline (concrete).

nodes.description: Template nodes: the afi.pipeline.v1 node shape with {"$param":...} slots admissible wherever a concrete tunable value is legal.

edges.description: Template edges: the afi.pipeline.v1 edge shape; condition operands may be slots.

metadata.description: OPTIONAL free-form annotations; non-authoritative; excluded from canonical hash material.

name.description: Parameter name referenced by {"$param":"<name>"} slots. Unique within the template.

schema.description: Inline JSON Schema (draft-07) fragment the supplied value must validate against at instantiation time.

required.description: Whether a value MUST be supplied at instantiation (true and no default => fail closed when absent).

default.description: OPTIONAL default value applied when the parameter is not supplied. Must itself validate against the parameter's schema fragment.

description.description: OPTIONAL human-readable purpose of the parameter.

$param.description: Name of a declared parameter whose resolved value replaces this slot at instantiation.

paramSlot.description: A substitution point: {"$param":"<name>"} stands anywhere a concrete tunable value is legal.

pluginId.description: Concrete plugin binding (never a slot — topology and binding are concrete).

pluginVersion.description: Exact plugin semver, or a slot resolving to one.

config.description: OPTIONAL node configuration. Slots are admissible anywhere inside (resolved recursively at instantiation); the resolved object is validated downstream against the plugin's paramsSchema.

failurePolicy.description: The degrade-only-when-critical:false coupling binds the INSTANTIATED pipeline (afi.pipeline.v1 enforces it structurally).

resourceLimits.description: OPTIONAL operational resource limits; slots admissible inside.

join.description: Concrete join declaration (never a slot — determinism of the join is structural).

templatePredicate.description: The afi.pipeline.v1 predicate tree with slots admissible as comparison operands, or a whole-condition slot.
